CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2019 Continued To Feb-19-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Unopposed Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement And Conditional Certification Of Class For Settlement Purposes; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Aug-15-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Mark Thomas, Esq. of the Law Offices of Mark Thomas, T:415.986.1338, for plaintiffs;
Anthony J. Orshansky, Esq. of CounselOne, PC, T:310.277.9945, for plaintiff William West, by Court Call;
Michael Seplow, Esq. of Schonbrun Seplow Harris & Hoffman LLP, T:310.396.0731, for plaintiff Angela Johnson, by Court Call;
Remy Kessler, Esq. of Reed Smith LLP, T:213.457.8000, for defendant Contemporary Services, by Court Call.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, ANGELA'S Unopposed Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement And Conditional Certification Of Class For Settlement Purposes as follows:

In light of plaintiffs' further evidentiary showing, including the declarations of Julie Green of CPT Group, Inc. and plaintiffs' counsel Michael D. Seplow, which fully address the Court's concerns, plaintiffs' motion for preliminary approval of class action settlement and conditional certification of class for settlement purposes is GRANTED.

Final approval hearing is set for January 8, 2020 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
